query: SELECT id, orderNumber, customerName, totalAmount, orderStatus, createdAt FROM orders WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE() AND (customerName LIKE '%Kannan%' OR userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'kannanswamy@hotmail.com')) ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
